name: acc-console-plugin
description: OpenShift dynamic console plugin for the Agentic Cell Corpus — the oversight plane of record (proposal 035, executes 020 WS-B). v1 is read-oriented oversight of the four acc.redhat.io CRs plus the single catalog->install create path.
//sdk-pin: Pinned to the 4.18-aligned console SDK line. OpenShift/console 4.18 is a recent, broadly-deployed GA release; its SDK peers PatternFly 5 + React 18, matching this proposal's PatternFly-v5 constraint. The console SUPPORT FLOOR is OCP 4.18 (see README.md and proposal 035 Q3). When bumping the cluster floor, bump @openshift-console/dynamic-plugin-sdk{,-webpack} together and re-pin the consolePlugin.dependencies['@console/pluginAPI'] below.

consolePlugin.name: acc-console-plugin
consolePlugin.description: Oversight plane for the Agentic Cell Corpus CRs (AgentCorpus, AgentCollective, AccCatalog, AccPackageInstall).
